verification_gate: Negative fixtures prove incomplete coverage, missing parents, cycles, orphan phases, unanchored tasks, and closed owner approval all block execution-packet generation; the complete graph passes.

gate_result.tdd_baseline: HEAD build-execution-packets.py rejects --coverage-control (unrecognized argument, exit 2): the gate did not exist before this change.

proof_summary: GRAPH-003 adds a fail-closed North Star coverage gate to the execution-packet builder. The gate is additive: it runs only when --coverage-control is supplied, and it executes BEFORE any stale-packet deletion or packet write, so a closed gate can neither create nor destroy packets. TDD baseline: the pre-change HEAD builder rejects --coverage-control with argparse exit 2 (no gate existed). Six negative fixtures under generated/fixtures/coverage-gate/ each violate exactly one required condition and each blocks packet generation with exit 1 on precisely the matching check: incomplete-coverage->coverage_complete, missing-parents->dependencies_resolve, cycles->no_dependency_cycles, orphan-phases->phases_decomposed, unanchored-tasks->tasks_anchored, closed-owner-approval->owner_opened_execution. The positive fixture (complete coverage, resolved dependencies, acyclic, decomposed phases, all tasks anchored, owner execution open) passes the gate AND builds packets DEMO-001 and DEMO-002. Fail-closed was verified against a pre-populated packet directory: the closed gate left the sentinel packet intact and wrote no manifest. Applied to the actual graph via a derived generated/north_star_coverage.control.json, the gate is correctly CLOSED today (coverage_complete + tasks_anchored + owner_opened_execution fail; dependencies_resolve, no_dependency_cycles, phases_decomposed pass), and the verdict is written to the declared target artifact generated/north_star_coverage.report.json. No product execution was performed.

live_commands.purpose: TDD baseline: pre-change builder has no coverage gate
Positive fixture opens the gate and builds packets; each negative fixture blocks on its single check
Fail-closed does not delete existing packets or write a manifest
output: coverage gate CLOSED — execution-packet generation blocked

live_commands.purpose: Real graph is currently fail-closed; report written to the declared target artifact
output: coverage gate CLOSED — failed checks: coverage_complete, tasks_anchored, owner_opened_execution
dependencies_resolve pass; no_dependency_cycles pass; phases_decomposed pass
